name: pack-shell-lint
title: Add shellcheck/actionlint coverage for pack-shipped shell
description: From loadsmith's security audit absences: consumers vendor ~10k lines of pack shell with only bash -n syntax gates. Add shellcheck (and actionlint for workflow templates if applicable) to the pack repo CI over templates/scripts and scripts/, fixing findings at least at severity=error, so every consumer inherits linted shell.
creator: sdelmas
